name: Alex Balats
tagline: MEng Computer Science at Durham University · AI / Systems / Agentic Networks
about: Im a MEng Computer Science student at Durham University building agentic AI systems and intelligent tooling. My work focuses on bridging machine learning, systems engineering, and real-world deployment from multi-agent optimisation to computer vision pipelines. Im currently interested in part-time roles and joining and helping out passionate teams on interesting projects and startups.

projects.title: Song Library Manager for Musicians
projects.description: Dynamic web app for managing song libraries with client-side rendering, AJAX-loaded JSON data, and a Node.js REST API.
highlights: Built dynamic web pages using DOM manipulation and AJAX to load JSON data.
Designed and deployed a REST API server in Node.js to handle JavaScript requests efficiently.
Improved cross-browser compatibility with ESLint integration and comprehensive Jest test coverage.

projects.title: CounterTime — IBM Educational AI Game
projects.description: Agentic educational game built for IBM to increase SkillsBuild engagement through adaptive AI-driven quizzes.
highlights: Collaborated in a team of 7 to deliver a full-stack AI-powered educational game to an IBM client.
Built an agentic reasoning system using LangGraph and WatsonX embeddings with a locally hosted IBM Granite model.
Integrated ChromaDB vector storage to inject game rules and quiz content into agent reasoning.
Produced industry-style documentation including requirements, sprint plans, and testing reports.

projects.title: Agentic Energy Optimization for Radio Access Networks
projects.description: Distributed AI agents for optimizing telecom network KPIs in a 6G-aligned simulation framework.
highlights: Implemented a distributed MCP runtime for real-time KPI optimization in a 6G-aligned telecom simulator.
Engineered Strands SDK agents combining reinforcement learning and tool-based reasoning for adaptive control.
Built a scalable Lambda–MCP pipeline enabling parallel agent execution and ~20% simulated power savings.

projects.title: Economic Advisor AI (Atom Bank Project)
projects.description: Multi-agent AI system for company analysis using news scraping, NLP, and time-series forecasting.
highlights: Designed a multi-agent pipeline using Microsoft AutoGen for financial and company intelligence.
Built a web scraper to extract, filter, and semantically analyse financial news.
Integrated metrics into an LSTM model to predict company performance trends.

projects.title: Multimodal AI Classification System
projects.description: Statistical and machine learning pipeline for high-dimensional multimodal data analysis.
highlights: Performed statistical analysis to identify skew, outliers, and class structure in multimodal datasets.
Implemented custom Random Forest classifiers using entropy and Gini impurity splits.
Applied dimensionality reduction to improve generalization, achieving ~93% accuracy on unseen data.

projects.title: High-Performance C++ Data Structures Library
projects.description: Low-level C++ library implementing cache-efficient hash tables and probabilistic data structures for high-throughput systems.
highlights: Implemented custom hash tables and probabilistic data structures for fast membership and lookup queries.
Focused on cache locality, memory layout, and branch prediction to maximize throughput.
Benchmarked performance against standard library implementations to validate improvements.

bullets: Led a team of Activity Leaders delivering onsite programmes to international students.
Managed staff rotas and responsibilities to ensure smooth daily operations.
Oversaw equipment, resources, and communications for large group activities.
Led excursions and supervised groups of up to 70 students across the UK.
Handled high-pressure and safety-critical situations with responsibility and adaptability.
Worked collaboratively with staff to deliver engaging, well-organized activities.
On track for First Class Honours (1:1).
Focus areas include AI engineering, distributed systems, and machine learning systems.
